info.name: Family Tribe App API Documentation
info.description: API for Family/Tribe app (Laravel). Set {{token}} from login response (Bearer). User/member IDs are numeric. Family linking: members send pending_family_name for admin review; family_id is admin-only.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: APIs for user authentication and registration.

request.description: Authenticate user with phone number or national ID.
Send a one-time password to the given phone number.
Verify the OTP code sent to the phone number.
Submit a request to join the family/tribe.

response.body:
{
  "message": "تم تقديم طلب الانضمام بنجاح",
  "join_request": {
    "id": "a1b2c3d4-5678-9abc-def0-123456789abc",
    "full_name": "محمد أحمد القحطاني",
    "phone_number": "0551234567",
    "national_id": "1234567890",
    "email": "mohammed@example.com",
    "city": "الرياض",
    "region": "منطقة الرياض",
    "status": "pending",
    "created_at": "2026-04-13T10:00:00.000000Z"
  }
}
response.name: success

request.description:
Step 3 of password recovery (UI): set a new password after OTP was verified in
`verify-otp` with purpose `reset`. Does not accept the code again.
Change the authenticated user's password.
Revoke the current access token.
Get a paginated list of active members. Supports search and filtering.

response.body:
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "9a8b7c6d-1234-5678-abcd-ef0123456789",
      "full_name": "محمد القحطاني",
      "phone_number": "0551234567",
      "national_id": "1234567890",
      "email": "mohammed@example.com",
      "city": "الرياض",
      "region": "منطقة الرياض",
      "bio": "مهندس برمجيات",
      "gender": "male",
      "role": "member",
      "status": "active",
      "is_featured": false,
      "profile_image": null,
      "created_at": "2026-04-01T10:00:00.000000Z"
    }
  ],
  "links": {"first": "http://algfari.test/api/v1/members?page=1", "last": "http://algfari.test/api/v1/members?page=1", "prev": null, "next": null},
  "meta": {"current_page": 1, "last_page": 1, "per_page": 15, "total": 1}
}
response.name: success

request.description: Get detailed information about a specific member.

formdata.description: Free-text family name (creates admin review request). Send empty to withdraw.

request.description: Update a member's profile information.

request.description: Get the membership card information for a member.
Get a paginated list of published news articles. Pinned articles appear first.

response.name: success

request.description: Get details of a specific news article. Increments the view count.

response.name: success

item.name: Events
item.description: APIs for browsing events and managing RSVPs.

request.description: Get a paginated list of active events.

response.name: success

request.description: Get details of a specific event with attendee count.

response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "id": "c3d4e5f6-7890-1abc-def2-345678901bcd",
    "title": "حفل زفاف آل محمد",
    "description": "حفل زفاف الأخ محمد بن عبدالله، يسعدنا دعوتكم للحضور والمشاركة في هذه المناسبة السعيدة.",

item.description: APIs for viewing family fund transactions and summary.

response.name: success

request.description: Get the family fund financial summary (total donations, expenses, and balance).
Submit a new suggestion to the administration.

response.name: success

Register a device for push notifications.
